---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A one-sentence description of the feature.

## Problem it solves
What limitation or friction prompted this request?

## Proposed solution
How you imagine this could work. Command-line flags, config options, output format changes, etc.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you thought of and why you prefer the one above.

## Additional context
Links, examples from similar tools, or anything else that would help.
